_meta.name: Work First
_meta.description: Leads with proof of work before identity. The work speaks first, then who you are contextualises it.
_meta.best_for: Senior IC roles. Research-heavy or technically rigorous roles. Companies with an engineering or craft culture where showing is more credible than telling. Roles where the JD lists specific outputs expected.

act2_work.note: Leads the page. Codegen should open act2 with a strong framing line — no preamble.

act1_hero.note: Comes second. The heading should feel like context for the work above, not an introduction.
